title: The Relaxed Assumption
description: The golem has been tested with 3 ingredients. Identify the animators and determine what potion their mix would produce.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing8: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing7: chest=✗ ears=✓  →  ears_only
  ing5: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive

Chest reacts to G+L. Ears react to R+L. Animation rule: Large reaction → '+', Small reaction → '−'. So animation ingredients must have G+ AND R+. Cross-reference with the mixing clues to identify those ingredients.
Animation ingredients: ing[6, 8] (Ppn, PPP). Mix: G+.
